# Codebase map (generated — do not edit)

Auto-derived structural facts about `src/`, regenerated by
[`scripts/gen-codebase-map.mjs`](../scripts/gen-codebase-map.mjs). **Do not hand-edit** —
run `npm run docs:map` to refresh; `npm run build` fails if this file is stale.

This file owns the facts that *drift* (importer counts, dead-code, god files).
[ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) owns the *meaning* (which file does what, and why).

**Definitions** — *Importers*: distinct non-test files outside the dir that statically
import it (0 ⇒ no live wiring). *Size*: S <250 · M <1k · L <3k · XL ≥3k non-test LOC
(tiers, not raw lines, so trivial edits don't churn this file). *God*: non-test files
over 400 LOC (the source-hygiene ceiling).

**Totals:** 61 top-level dirs · 61 live · 0 with no live importer · 1281 non-test source files · 0 god files (>400 LOC).
